a:r.a:t: Our compensation design assessment was guided by an 8-point design framework
Establish payment period based on market conditions and sales life cycle
Establish pay mix and leverage based on the degree of personal influence and complexity of the sales process
Outline which jobs should be eligible for sales compensation plan
Assess market pay levels, pay strategy,
Set quotas for each performance measure
Apply SPIFFs throughout the year to drive targeted behaviors over short periods of time​
Set measures to reflect lower and upper 10 percent of performance
Select key performance measures and relative weights to link to incentive compensation
